summary: cli/worktree: 7 scenarios (remove tolerates-gone / refuses-dirty / force-discards-dirty, add placement-fallback, add nonbinding-no-note, label names-space / omitted-default) have no CLI-surface test; behavior proven only at the mux/worktree library seam
evidence: unbound after the binding sweep; verified via addAndOpenWorktree/removeWorktree in worktree-session.test.ts, not via a run(program,['worktree',...]) CLI drive

summary: cli/lookup: no CLI test for lookup-close-terminates-pane (empty stdout + exit 0) or lookup-list-space-rendered-whole (spaced label/cwd not split across columns)
evidence: both unbound; close-driven tests present assert resolution, not the close success contract

summary: cli/template/apply: no CLI manifest-workspace test — open --template --format json on herdr (workspace value) and tabs-on-tmux (workspace null); the only manifest-workspace proofs are library-level
evidence: 2 unbound; template-session.test.ts manifest tests are library surface, no matching apply-manifest @id there

summary: mux/driving: no test for driving-unknown-token-not-rescued (tmux types an unknown token literally) or driving-wezterm-non-core-key-known (a known non-core key becomes its escape sequence)
evidence: 2 unbound; adapter tests cover core keys and unencodable tokens, not these two backend-specific cases

summary: mux/lookup: no test for lookup-wezterm-name-never-resolves (verb-by-name on wezterm) or lookup-ambiguous-name-fails-all-verbs (library every-verb it.each; only a single-verb ambiguity test exists)
evidence: 2 unbound at the library resolution surface

summary: mux/placement: no wezterm test for placement-wezterm-workspace-never-absent or placement-wezterm-ratio-not-for-tab-workspace (wezterm ratio tests are pane-split only)
evidence: 2 unbound; no wezterm test asserts these

summary: template/apply: apply-tab-label-never-parsed-back has no apply-node test — the identical behavior is proven only by its capture-node twin (capture-tab-label-not-composed)
evidence: 1 unbound; cross-node claim, no separate apply-surface test

summary: template/capture: no test drives capture against an adapter missing the optional seam member for capture-workspace-enumerate-unsupported-refused or capture-geometry-unsupported-refused (only the CLI observable at a different node exists)
